summary.next_recommended_goal: Proceed to GOAL-064 Adoption Readiness Friction Audit; recommended model level medium

roadmap_model.v0.2: Nornyx Graph + stronger generic contract model
roadmap_model.v0.4: Contract-only adapter bridges for Governed Delivery Control Plane, Agentic Development Harness, GovernanceAdapter, telecom ops, and business ops
roadmap_model.v0.5-v0.9: Maturity bands for graph validation, profile conformance, adapter conformance, bounded execution readiness, and release-candidate stabilization
roadmap_model.v1.0: Stable generalized agentic contract language released as GitHub source release v1.0.0; v1.0.1 hygiene is closed; package publishing and GOAL-100 remain gated

summary.roadmap_note: v1.0.1 hygiene is closed. Next work should be named strategic milestones, not open-ended hygiene follow-ups. GOAL-100 remains locked.

pmo_readability.history_policy: Preserve completed goal blocks and evidence links; avoid repeating the full completed-goal chain in summary text.
pmo_readability.portal_guidance: Read summary for current state, goal ledger for history, and vision maps for roadmap context.

strategic_next_tracks.title: Nornyx Graph Demo Expansion Plan
strategic_next_tracks.reason: Moves from release hygiene into a concrete product capability while staying static, validation-first, and non-runtime.

strategic_next_tracks.title: Adoption Readiness Friction Audit
strategic_next_tracks.reason: Improves first-user success without package publication or deployment.

strategic_next_tracks.title: Profile Conformance Hardening Plan
strategic_next_tracks.reason: Prepares stronger optional-domain profile checks without making profiles mandatory core language concepts.

blocks.title: GOAL-000 — Green Baseline Stabilization
completed: Clean replacement repo prepared
Noisy generated/runtime folders removed
CLI compatibility restored
PMO status contract normalized
Active Developer PMO Portal selected
Local validation completed
Clean baseline committed to git
risks: Local environment may differ from packaged validation environment

blocks.title: GOAL-001 — Core Block Spec Freeze
completed: Finalized v0.1 block taxonomy
Locked core vs deferred extension boundary
Added checker-level tests for the frozen block surface
Documented the canonical v0.1 top-level blocks
risks: Scope creep if advanced extensions are promoted too early

blocks.title: GOAL-002 — Parser/Checker Hardening
completed: Added stable diagnostics for malformed named core block entries
Added harness context reference checks
Hardened goal packet diagnostics for phase, scope, validation, evidence, approval, and stop rules
Updated starter profile output to satisfy the hardened goal contract
Added focused checker regression tests
risks: Weak diagnostics slow authoring assistant and Codex repair loops

blocks.title: GOAL-003 — Artifact Generator Hardening
completed: Added deterministic manifest metadata with artifact hashes
Added generated task packets for roadmap goals
Exposed the documented goal-plan CLI path
Added regression tests for generated artifacts and manifest stability
risks: Generated artifacts can drift from .nyx source without checks
blocks.next_goal: GOAL-004 — Formal grammar and schema model

blocks.title: GOAL-004 — Formal Grammar and Schema Model
completed: Added EBNF-style grammar summary for the YAML-compatible model
Added JSON Schema for the frozen v0.1 block surface
Added schema model module and CLI inspection command
Added regression tests that keep schema and checker block surfaces aligned
risks: Future tooling may depend on the schema, so schema drift must remain tested
blocks.next_goal: GOAL-005 — Context provenance and trust boundaries

blocks.title: GOAL-005 — Context Provenance and Trust Boundaries
completed: Added provenance source URIs and hashes to context pack entries
Added channel, taint, trust level, and may-define-policy metadata
Added authority ordering and authority ranks for matching repo files
Documented context trust boundary rules
Added regression tests for provenance and content handling
risks: Future enforcement may depend on trust metadata, so authority drift must remain tested

blocks.title: GOAL-006 — Harness Runtime MVP
completed: Added safe local harness run manifest generation
Added context pack, trace event, approval log, and evidence scaffold outputs
Recorded validation gates without auto-satisfying evidence or approval
Bounded repair metadata to a maximum of three attempts
Added CLI and regression tests for harness-run
risks: Runtime execution remains intentionally disabled until policy and capability enforcement mature

blocks.title: GOAL-007 — Evidence and Trace Runtime
completed: Added local trace bundle output with span-like fields
Added trace digest generation
Added evidence manifest artifact hashes
Linked harness-run manifests, trace digests, and evidence manifests
Documented local OpenTelemetry-compatible trace shape
risks: Evidence and trace artifacts are audit-sensitive and must remain local unless exporter approval is explicit
blocks.next_goal: GOAL-008 — Policy, guardrail, and capability enforcement

blocks.title: GOAL-008 — Policy, Guardrail, and Capability Enforcement
completed: Added local policy report generation for harness planning
Added default-deny capability checks for tool, connector, and model steps
Added guardrail requirement for planned model and connector use
Integrated policy summaries into harness manifests and trace evidence
Added policy-check CLI command and regression tests
risks: Conservative default-deny reports may block older examples until explicit capabilities are declared
blocks.next_goal: GOAL-009 — Eval runner and eval integrity

blocks.title: GOAL-009 — Eval Runner and Eval Integrity
completed: Added local eval report generation for declared evals
Added metric threshold parsing and optional local results comparison
Added holdout dataset hashing and train/holdout overlap detection
Added integrity warnings for missing holdout, contamination, adversarial rotation, and regression baseline metadata
Integrated eval summaries into harness manifests and trace evidence
Added eval-run CLI command and regression tests
risks: Existing examples without observed metric results or holdout metadata now surface pending evidence and integrity warnings

blocks.title: GOAL-010 — Plugin, Connector, MCP/A2A Adapters
completed: Added local connector and plugin manifest planning
Added MCP/A2A adapter decision reports without live execution
Added blocked-by-default checks for unsafe modes, endpoints, commands, undeclared harness connector references, and sensitive A2A sharing
Added connector-plan CLI command and connector manifest schema
Integrated connector summaries into harness manifests and trace evidence
Added regression tests for connector and plugin adapter boundaries
risks: Connector manifests are contract-only; live MCP/A2A execution remains blocked until explicit capability, approval, sandbox, trace, and evidence gates are implemented

blocks.title: GOAL-011 — LSP and Editor Tooling
completed: Added local editor manifest metadata
Added syntax highlighting metadata for Nornyx blocks and references
Added LSP-shaped diagnostics from parser/checker output
Added completion items for top-level blocks and document references
Added document symbol extraction for named Nornyx entries
Added editor metadata CLI commands and regression tests

blocks.title: GOAL-012 — Stable Control-Plane Release
completed: Added local release-readiness report generation
Added release-check CLI command and release readiness script
Added release candidate notes and no-go conditions

Recorded mandatory human release approval gate without publishing or tagging
risks: Actual public release, tag, package version change, or announcement remains blocked until explicit human approval

blocks.title: GOAL-013 — Full Language Evolution Research
completed: Added research-only language evolution RFC
Mapped semantic core, type/effect system, workflow constructs, and native backend research tracks

Recorded approval gates that block public syntax, parser/checker semantics, runtime, backend, dependency, connector, release, and security-model promotion
Added regression tests that keep research tracks non-promotional
risks: Future language expansion can create scope creep if research tracks are promoted without a scoped goal and human approval

blocks.title: GOAL-014 — Distinct Language Developer Experience
completed: Language differentiation thesis captured
Developer experience concepts documented

Added profile metadata coverage for every built-in profile

Grammar-native parser, real LSP/Tree-sitter support, runtime execution, and connector execution remain future work

maps.title: North Star Map
maps.purpose: Make Nornyx the executable contract layer for human-model software delivery.

nodes.label: Language core
nodes.summary: Freeze stable v0.1 blocks before expanding runtime scope.

nodes.label: Governed agents
nodes.summary: Context, policy, harness, evals, evidence, and approval constrain AI work.

nodes.label: Measurable delivery
nodes.summary: KPI scoring and evidence packs now provide local reviewability gates.

maps.title: Strategic Roadmap Map
maps.purpose: Keep completed v0.1 scaffold work separate from future maturity bands.

nodes.label: v0.1
nodes.summary: Safe AI-coding / agentic repo control-plane scaffold; all completed PMO goals are recorded as v0.1 work.

nodes.label: v0.1.1
nodes.summary: Cleanup and contract hardening: mapping block validation, stale metadata cleanup, roadmap alignment, and PMO wording cleanup.

nodes.label: v0.2
nodes.summary: Nornyx Graph + stronger generic contract model.

nodes.label: v0.4
nodes.summary: Adapters for Governed Delivery Control Plane, Agentic Development Harness, GovernanceAdapter, telecom ops, and business ops.

nodes.label: v0.5-v0.9
nodes.summary: Maturity bands for graph validation, profile conformance, adapter conformance, bounded execution readiness, and release-candidate stabilization.

nodes.label: v1.0
nodes.summary: Stable generalized agentic contract language released as GitHub source release v1.0.0. v1.0.1 hygiene keeps positioning, adoption, graph demo, schema, README, manifest, and PMO summary metadata clear without package publication, production deployment, GOAL-100 promotion, or unrestricted connector execution.

maps.title: Development Flight Plan
